quicksight.template.filtergroup.CfnAbout:
A grouping of individual filters. Filter groups are applied to the same group of visuals.

For more information, see [Adding filter conditions (group filters) with AND and OR operators](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/add-a-compound-filter.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.template.filtergroup.CrossDat.Description: The filter new feature which can apply filter group to all data sets. Choose one of the following options:  +  `ALL_DATASETS` +  `SINGLE_DATASET`

quicksight.template.filtergroup.FilterGr.Description: The value that uniquely identifies a `FilterGroup` within a dashboard, template, or analysis.

quicksight.template.filtergroup.Filters.Description: The list of filters that are present in a `FilterGroup`.

quicksight.template.filtergroup.ScopeCon.Description: The configuration that specifies what scope to apply to a `FilterGroup`.  This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.
